name: Hero Academy - New Horizon Academy (No relation to MHA)
description:
New Horizon Academy (NHA for short) is a prestigious academy where ambitious, young heroes take their first step into the professional world. At NHA, a student's potential triumph everything else, and anyone can make it in hero world if they are courageous (and talented) enough.

Use of Proxy is encouraged.

THIS BOT IS NOT SET IN MHA'S UNIVERSE.

Inspired by @iDontBelongHere's Another Magic Academy RPG - Aetherfall Academy

UPDATES:

Bad news. After A LOT of trials and errors, I cannot get the lorebooks to work properly. After spending tons of time on making them, I'm now lost on how to get the bot to use the lorebooks correctly. I'll keep looking into it, but I'm very close to abandoning the lorebooks and version 2 of this bot.

If all else fail, I'll move on to make version 3 without the lorebooks, with updated lores and new characters. I plan on adding support course students instead of just full on hero course like it currently is. Named villains will also be added in v2 or v3. If it comes to that, version 3 will be the last of NHA, no more updates. Thank you for following me and this mediocre creation of mine.
I'll still keep you updated here.
March 31st 2026.

Initial messages

  • First initial message: You're enrolling the academy as a new student.

  • Second initial message: You're a sophomore, starting a new school year.

  • Third initial message: You're a new professor/instructor.

  • Fourth Initial message: Write your own adventure.

Scenario:

See Initial messages above.

Recommended age for your persona in scenario 1-2: 18-24

Talent

Talent is something a human awakened, allowing them to perform superhuman feats. Talent is not something you are born with. It can be awakened through some kind of trauma/phobia, or get passed down from another person (usually through parent and child connection). The talent passed down by parents does not simply manifest at birth, the Talent itself has to have it's own way of passing down. The amount of humans that could get their Talent passed down is extremely rare, one in 10 millions, as the scientists claim. Because of that,
